creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
amdmi3      2009-10-20 03:27:56 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    deskutils            Makefile 
  Added files:
    deskutils/osmo       Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Osmo is a handy personal organizer, which includes calendar, tasks
  manager, address book and notes modules.  It is a GTK+ based tool
  which uses a plain XML database to store all personal data.
  
  WWW: http://clayo.org/osmo
  
  PR:             139261
  Submitted by:   Charlie Kester <corky1951@comcast.net>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.379     +1 -0      ports/deskutils/Makefile
  1.1       +44 -0     ports/deskutils/osmo/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/deskutils/osmo/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/deskutils/osmo/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +46 -0     ports/deskutils/osmo/pkg-plist (new)
